## Problem

The concrete situation you are trying to solve. What are you doing today, and where does it fall short?

## Proposed solution

What you would like deltat to do.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you tried or ruled out, and why.

## Additional context

Links to `docs/REQUIREMENTS.md` items, related issues, or examples.
